title: Tech And Nature S3
description:
A server with two opposite mod and side
Tech and Nature
body:
Tech and nature Is juste a small modded Minecraft server for my friends, we do not attend this server to be public(yet)

This server Is base on Nature and Tech as in the name, so its a seperated modpack:
## Tech Part
1. Create
2. create addons
3. Tacz
4. Clockwork
5. aviator dreams
6. immersive saga
7. man of many planes

## Nature part
1. biome o' plenty
2. yung's mod
3. let's do mods
4. explorify
5. incedium
6. nullscape
